'''Skuumaa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] contested during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] traveled there ahead of the main [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] assault in order to sabotage strategic targets and "prepare the battlefield", shortly after their involvement in an anti-terror operation on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
